subcodes.first_line: O my God and God of existence, both unseen and seen! I beseech Thee by the Word which Thou didst cause to issue forth from the mine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی و اله الوجود من الغیب و الشهود اسئلک بالکلمه التی اخرجتها من معدن
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for martyrs, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment, @love of God
